:define fib [n] ->
    n ?cond: 
        n <= 1 ?then: 
            n <= 1 <= n ;then: 
                n
            ;else: 
                fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)
        ;else: 
            fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)
    ;end
;;

loop i over [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6] {
    print ("(", i, ", ", fib(i), ")")
}

:define fib [n] ->
    n ?cond: 
        n <= 1 ?then: 
            <= n
        ;else: 
            <= fib[n - 1] + fib[n - 2]
    ;end
;;

loop i over [0..6] {
    print [i, fib[i]]
}

:define fib [n] -> 
    n ?cond: 
        n <= 1 ?cond: 
            <= n ;else: 
            fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2) 
    ;else: 
        n 
;; 

loop i over [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6] {
    print (i, fib(i))
}

:define fib [n] -> 
    n ?cond: 
        n <= 1 ?then: 
            n <= 1 <= n 
        ;else: 
            fib [n - 1] + fib [n - 2] 
    ;end
;;

loop i over [0..6] {
    print [i, fib [i]] 
}

:define fib [n] ->
    n ?cond: 
        n <= 1 ?cond: 
            <= n
        ;else: 
            <= fib[n - 1] + fib[n - 2]
    ;end
;;

loop i over [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6] {
    print [i, fib[i]]
}
